---
title: "My Quartostone Workspace"
filters:
  - quartostone
---

# Welcome to Quartostone

This workspace was scaffolded with `quarto use template davidrsch/quartostone`.

## Getting started

1. **Start the Quartostone server:**
   ```bash
   npx quartostone serve
   ```
   Then open <http://localhost:4242> in your browser.

2. **Create pages** from the sidebar tree using the **+** button.

3. **Edit pages** in Visual mode (WYSIWYG) or Source mode (raw `.qmd`).

4. **Render** your workspace as a static Quarto website:
   ```bash
   quarto render
   ```

## Custom callouts

The `quartostone` Quarto extension provides two extra callout types:

::: {.callout-todo}
## Write introduction
This is an action item.
:::

::: {.callout-question}
## Why does this work?
Space for open questions or research notes.
:::

## Backlinks

Backlinks to this page from other pages are automatically injected by the
`quartostone` filter when the `quartostone-backlinks` YAML key is present.
They appear at the bottom of each page as a linked list.

## Learn more

- [Quarto documentation](https://quarto.org/docs/)
- [Quartostone repository](https://github.com/davidrsch/quartostone)
